sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n432" key="a)gelastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγελαστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n432.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gregarious, social</tr_>, Ph <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.202</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:21:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
